name: web_discover
description: Discover websites or media. Without download_dir, website mode returns cleaned text and media modes return links. With download_dir, websites are saved as cleaned Markdown and media files are downloaded. A single website or direct file URL is fetched directly.

cli.description: Optional CLI-form command line. Example: image "space cruiser" --download-dir media

query.description: Literal search query, direct webpage URL, or direct media file URL. 3 key words maximum. Use explicit CLI fields such as include_regex and exclude_regex for filtering.

include_regex.description: Optional regex that result title/url/snippet must match.

exclude_regex.description: Optional regex that result title/url/snippet must not match.

download_dir.description: Workspace-relative or absolute directory for saved files. If omitted, nothing is downloaded or saved.

min_size.description: Minimum downloaded media file size in bytes.

max_size.description: Maximum downloaded media file size in bytes.

format.description: yt-dlp format selector for video/audio downloads, for example best[height<=540][ext=mp4]/best[height<=540]/best.
